access_token.description: Auth0 Management API access token, used directly as a Bearer token when set; never logged. Takes priority over the client_id/client_secret M2M mode below (dual-auth ordering, conventions.md §3).

client_id.description: Auth0 M2M application client id, used with client_secret to perform an OAuth2 client-credentials exchange against <base_url>/oauth/token when access_token is not set. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Auth0 M2M application client secret; paired with client_id for the OAuth2 client-credentials exchange. Never logged.

audience.description: Audience form parameter sent on the M2M OAuth2 client-credentials token request, scoping the issued token to the Management API (Auth0 requires this explicitly; there is no engine mechanism to derive it from base_url — see docs.md's Known limits). Required when using client_id/client_secret auth; typically <base_url>/api/v2/.

base_url.description: Auth0 tenant domain, e.g. https://your-tenant.us.auth0.com. No default: legacy also requires this explicitly (the base is tenant-specific, never a fixed literal).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
